Atty. JOSEPH K. BRAVO, Esq. of Bravo Law Offices (Tel: 415-512-6700) as movant;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel Re: Defendant Cybernib Corporation.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel granted.

Movant to submit a proposed order using the mandatory Judicial Council form.
